notes: First mutation sensitivity study. Compares base tool schema against name-mutated, schema-mutated, and fully-mutated profiles across the shared 12-task toy dataset with 3 seeds each.

metadata.purpose: Measure how tool schema mutation affects coding agent pass@1, reward, and error rates
metadata.dataset: toy_tasks.jsonl (12 Python tasks across bugfix, lint_format, type_fix, and small_feature)
metadata.modes_tested: base vs name_only vs schema_only vs name_description_schema
